The Visionaries Behind Mithaas

Meet Our Founders

Our Leadership

The People Who Started It All

Mr. Pushpendra
Sharma
Founder & Managing Director
"Food is not just nourishment — it is a medium for connection, love, and shared joy."

Raised in a close-knit family, Mr. Pushpendra developed a deep appreciation for food as a bridge between people. After his B.Tech & MBA and three years in the corporate world — travelling across India — he left his career to follow his passion. In 2012, Mithaas was born in a single outlet in Sector 53, Noida. Today it stands at 25+ outlets across NCR with 1000+ employees.

B.Tech & MBA Founded 2012 Visionary Entrepreneur
Mr. Kuldeep
Sharma
Co-Founder
"Big visions are realised through small steps and strong-willed actions."

Mr. Kuldeep Sharma co-founded Mithaas alongside Mr. Pushpendra, bringing operational depth and a relentless commitment to quality. His hands-on leadership has been central to every growth milestone — from the first outlet in Noida to a multi-city network across the NCR. His drive continues to shape the standards every Mithaas team member works by.

Co-Founder Operations Quality First Growth Driver
Where the Magic Happens

Inside Our Factory

Our in-house production facility in Noida operates with strict hygiene protocols, skilled halwais, and the finest ingredients — ensuring every sweet that reaches you is made with care and consistency.
